title: Craft Attack 13 (14 soon)
description: A Craft Attack 13–inspired modpack focused on performance, optimization, and visual satisfaction — explore freely with Freecam, and enjoy ultimate smoothness.
body:
This modpack is based on the setups used by the Craft Attack 13 members and focuses on delivering the best mix of optimization, visuals, and smooth gameplay.
Roam freely through the world using the Freecam mod, and enjoy ultimate performance through advanced client-side tweaks and optimization mods.
Whether you’re exploring, building, or recording content, this pack ensures a lag-free and visually appealing experience — perfect for both casual players and content creators inspired by Craft Attack 13.
